title: SEYMAC stock Case for iPad 9th/8th/7th Generation (10.2 Inch) 2021/2020/2019, Heavy Duty Shockproof with Screen Protector, 360° Rotating Stand/Hand Strap, Pencil Holder & Shoulder Strap, Camo+Purple
features: [Compatible Models]: Exclusively designed shockproof case for iPad 9th/8th/7th Generation 10.2 inch 2021/2020/2019 (Model: A2602 / A2603 / A2604 / A2605 / A2270 / A2428 / A2429 / A2430 / A2197 / A2198 / A2200). NOT fit any other model

[360° Rotating & Adjustable Stand/ Hand Strap]: The rotatable kickstand can stably support your iPad 9th/8th/7th Generation, helping to free your hands and providing you with a more flexible & comfortable viewing/typing angle. With soft hand strap, you can hold your iPad securely with one hand and use it at any angle, convenient for meetings or travel

[Full Body Protection + Screen Protector]: This case for iPad 9th/8th/7th generation 10.2 inch is designed with anti-shock material, with hard PC frame, soft silicone skin and built-in screen protector. 3-in-1 all-round protection design to keep your iPad from scratches, shocks, or drop damages

[Practical Shoulder Strap & Pencil Holder]: The shoulder strap for iPad 9th/8th/7th generation case is detachable and adjustable, convenient for both kids and adults to carry the tablet during hiking, traveling or other outdoor activities. Built-in pencil holder to safely store the stylus and take it at any time to avoid loss
[Customer Service]: If you encounter any problems about product use, installation or size mismatch, etc., please let us know and we will help you solve the problem within 24 hours

Case for iPad 9th/8th/7th Generation 10.2 inch Merchant video Compatibility: ONLY for iPad 9th/8th/7th Generation 10.2 inch 2021/2020/2019 Released. Model Number: A2602, A2603, A2604, A2605, A2270, A2428, A2429, A2430, A2197, A2198, A2200. Notice: Pencil is NOT included! 3-in-1 Protective Case with Screen Protector Top: Hard Plastic Front Cover Center: Non-slip Shell with Rotating Hand Grip Stand Bottom: Soft Impact-resistant Silicone Skin PS: We offer 2 front covers for your choice: One with screen protector, another without . You can choose to install any of them, and you can also fit your own screen protector. Precise Cutouts & Built-in Pencil Holder Easy access to all buttons, controls, ports and camera of iPad 9th/8th/7th generation 10.2 inch. Thickened Corners design to protect your iPad camera and screen from scratches. And the charging port is protected by a dust-proof cover. A Built-in Pencil Holder is available. 360° Rotating/ Adjustable Hand Strap The hand strap is made from premium soft fabric, providing you with comfortable hand feeling. The width can be adjusted, fit for both kids and adults. 360 degrees rotatable and easy to hold the center gravity of your iPad 9th/8th/7th generation, bringing you more convenience of using iPad. Multi-Angle Adjustable Kickstand The sturdy built-in kickstand can be rotated 360 degrees and hold your 9th/8th/7th generation iPad stably in both landscape and portrait angles. No matter you want to type, watch videos or surf the web, the stand extremely helps improve comfort and gives you ideal hands-free using experience. Practical Hand Strap and Kickstand for Your Convenience Detachable and Adjustable Shoulder Strap, Suitable for Both Kids and Adults With the portable shoulder strap, you can easily carry your 9th/8th/7th generation iPad for outdoor working, travelling, hiking or climbing. The length is long enough for you to hang your iPad on the seat back when travling by car, which is specially friendly to kids.
